data.name: Cacophonic Call
data.description:
You unleash an ululating scream that radiates from you in a 30-foot radius. The scream can be heard up to 1,000 feet away. Each creature of your choice in the area must make a Constitution or Wisdom saving throw (its choice).
**Successful Constitution Save.** The creature takes 4d8 Psychic damage and is Frightened of you until the start ofyour next turn. While Frightened in this way, it can only cast spells of 1st level or lower.
**Successful Wisdom Save.** The creature takes 4d8 Thunder damage and is Dazed until the start of your next turn.
**Failed Save (Either Type).** The creature suffers both ofthe above effects.
data.forHigherLevels: Both the Thunder and Psychic damage is increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 7th.
